benefits.description: 246 lbs weight loss over 18 weeks on tirzepatide (397 to 307 lbs), following prior loss of 196 lbs through diet and exercise (556 to 360 lbs over ~2 years)
Able to manage hunger and resist late-night eating binges with medication support
Physical transformation, facial feature changes requiring Face ID reset multiple times
BPC-157/TB-500 blend used previously for ruptured bicep tendon recovery

protocol_notes: Started tirzepatide in December 2023 at 397 lbs, currently 306 lbs (18 weeks total). Prior unsuccessful diet/exercise only attempt: 556→360 lbs over ~2 years before regaining 30 lbs. User states tirzepatide sourced from biotech supplier (previously used same vendor for BPC-157/TB-500 blend). Brand mentioned: Mounjaro. User reports initially considered semaglutide but chose tirzepatide as newer alternative. Emphasized not a 'magic' solution; requires disciplined calorie deficit and lifestyle adherence. Height: 6'3".
